note: Order-3 heptagonal tiling {7,3} — three regular heptagons meet at each vertex. The basis of Escher's Circle Limit woodcuts. Rendered in the Poincaré disk (float).
Order-3 octagonal tiling {8,3} — three regular octagons meet at each vertex. Large, open octagons. Rendered in the Poincaré disk (float).
Order-4 pentagonal tiling {5,4} — four regular pentagons meet at each vertex. Rendered in the Poincaré disk (float).
Order-5 square tiling {4,5} — five squares meet at each vertex. A curved, dense grid. Rendered in the Poincaré disk (float).
